content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed full branch delta (src/adapters/fs.rs, src/cli/project.rs, src/cli/milestone.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs, src/shared/error.rs, tests/cli.rs; run.rs untouched as designed since the shared helper active_same_bead_conflict_resolution now governs both record_task_run_start and create-from-bead). Validated that execute_create_from_bead acquires the task-runs lock before any check, runs reject_duplicate_active_bead_creation and reject_existing_same_bead_project_creation before project_exists, and keeps claim_bead_in_br after all validation. The new AppError variants DuplicateActiveBead and DuplicateBeadProject are targeted, callers special-case them through is_create_from_bead_duplicate_conflict, the read-only FsTaskRunLineageStore::active_task_runs_for_bead helper is properly factored, and orphan/corrupt/mismatch/drift states all surface repair guidance instead of minting shadow projects. Retry-on-failed routes to `run resume`, and different-bead active conflicts still go through record_task_run_start's existing guard. Tests in tests/cli.rs cover duplicate active, terminal-allowed, orphan, missing/corrupt run snapshot, not-started-with-drift, mismatched task_source, running-without-lineage, legacy runless, legacy lineage-backed retry, ambiguous retries, same-project-id reuse, and the run-start different-bead preservation case. Noted only two non-blocking items: DuplicateBeadProject's hardcoded 'not_started' differs from RunStatus::NotStarted's Display 'not started' (cosmetic, asserted by tests), and the task-runs lock spans claim_bead_in_br (intentional for atomicity). No fix-now, planned-elsewhere, or propose-new-bead findings.

## Amendments

None.
